narrative:
Gallipolis Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 926 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.1 percentage points.
